label_notes: Source: training knowledge (2026-03-20). WebFetch blocked due to network egress restrictions. Expedia collects extensive payment and travel document data. Note that data sharing with hotel/airline partners is necessary for booking functionality but scope should be clearly understood. VERIFY all claims against current live policy before publication.
